violations.description: Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. -Case of single use paper towels stored on floor.
Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Spray bottle with clear liquid was not labeled (stated as vinegar).
Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Sani sink found at 100ppm Chlorine. *Should be maintained at 50ppm Chlorine.
